title: Section 6
content: And it is herby enacted that tahsildars shall have authority, subject to the orders of the Collector, to delegate the powers vested in them by the second section of this Act to any public servants placed under their authority; and that the provisions of 1[sections 3 and 5] of this Act shall apply to all public servants to whom those powers shall have so delegated in the same manner as they apply to tahsildars.
footnote: 1. The words and figures in square brackets have been substituted for the words “the three last proceeding sections” by the Amending Act, 1801 (XII of 1891). General Acts, Vol. IV.
